mapper.sql: SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.credits AS credit, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room FROM student s
( (#{semester} IS NULL AND sm.is_current = 1) OR ( #{semester} IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester} ) )
mapper.select: JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time

JOIN cart_item ci ON ci.student_id = s.student_id JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = ci.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_current = 1 ORDER BY ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.credits AS credit, p.name AS professor, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, ss.day_of_week, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room, SUM(c.credits) OVER (ORDER BY c.course_name, cs.section_no) AS running_credits FROM student s JOIN course_section cs ON 1 = 1 JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND sm.is_current = 1 AND cs.status = 'OPEN' AND c.target_year = s.year_level AND (#{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(c.course_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM enrollment e WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.section_id = cs.section_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' ) ) WHERE running_credits <= #{maxCredits} ORDER BY day_of_week, start_time
